ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., regular, moderator, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user account is active */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "biography" TEXT /* User's biography or about section */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "field_path" TEXT /* Path to the permission setting (e.g., can_viewer_post) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what the permission allows */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the permission (e.g., content, notifications, privacy) */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the permission is set by default */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user permission setting */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who has the permission */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the permission assigned to the user */,
  "value" INTEGER /* Actual value of the permission (true/false) */,
  "type" INTEGER /* Type associated with the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the permission was assigned to the user */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the permission setting */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the permission setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES permissions ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., regular, moderator) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON or text field to store the default permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "settings_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user whose permission was changed */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission that was changed */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., added, removed) */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change took place */,
  "old_value" INTEGER /* The old value of the permission before the change */,
  "new_value" INTEGER /* The new value of the permission after the change */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_settings_logs_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_settings_logs_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES permissions ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_settings_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, change) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action occurred */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* More detailed type of action (e.g., view, change, delete) */,
  "context" TEXT /* Context or additional information about the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string from which the action was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
